mapper.insert: insert into t_learn_memory (memory_no, begin_time, end_time, learn_duration, memory_place, memory_place_detail, memory_images, memory_source, memory_owner, row_memory_no, learn_type, learn_content, learn_node, learn_document) values (#{memoryNo}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{learnDuration}, #{memoryPlace}, #{memoryPlaceDetail}, #{memoryImages}, #{memorySource}, #{memoryOwner}, #{rowMemoryNo}, #{learnType}, #{learnContent}, #{learnNode}, #{learnDocument})
mapper.delete:
delete from t_learn_memory where id in
#{item}
